title: Endhira Logathu Sundariye Lyrics in Tamil From 2 Point 0 Film
stanzas:
En uyire uyirin batterye
enai nee priyaathe
En uyire uyirin batterye
thuliyum kuraiyaathe.

endhira logathu sundhariye
engalil kadhalai sindhuriye
engine-ai alli konjuriye
hey minsaara samsarame

raththam illaa kannam rendil
muththam vaikkattaa.
puththam pudhu
java roja pookkal seiyattaa

suththam seidha
data mattum
ootti vidattaa.
hey un bus-in
conductor naan.

En uyire uyirin batterye
enai nee priyaathe.
En uyire uyirin batterye
thuliyum kuraiyaathe.(2)

edhira logathu sundhariye
engalil kadhalai sindhuriye
engine-ai alli konjuriye
hey minsaara samsaaramae

en sensor-ukku
unarvum unavum nee.
en cable vazhi
paravum tharavum nee

en visaipori iyakkam
mayakkam nee.
en neuron ellaam
niraiyum nilavum nee.

en pugupadhive
en kadavuch solle
en thani madi-kanini
rajini nee ..

ilakum ilakum irumpoove
indre urugi ondraai aavomaa

alpha en alpha
neethaan ini..
mega o-mega
neethaan ini.
love you from
zero to infinity.

En uyire uyirin batterye
enai nee priyaathe.
En uyire uyirin batterye
thuliyum kuraiyaathe.(3)

edhira logathu sundhariye
engalil kadhalai sindhuriye
engine-ai alli konjuriye
hey minsaara samsaaramae

suththam seidha
data mattum
ootti vidattaa.
hey un bus-in
conductor naan.

En uyire uyirin batterye
enai nee priyaathe.
En uyire uyirin batterye
thuliyum kuraiyaathe.(2)
tamilStanzas:
என் உயிரே உயிரின்  பேட்டரியே
எனை நீ பிரியாதே
என் உயிரே உயிரின் பேட்டரியே
துளியும் குறையாதே.

எந்திர லோகத்து சுந்தரியே
எண்களில் காதலை சிந்தூரியே
எஞ்சினை அள்ளி  கொஞ்சுரியே
ஹே மின்சார சம்சாரமே

ரத்தம் இல்லா கன்னம் ரெண்டில்
முத்தம் வைக்கட்டா.
புத்தம் புது ஜாவா ரோஜா
பூக்க செய்யட்டா
சுத்தம் செய்த டேட்டா மட்டும்
ஊட்டி விடட்டா .
ஹே உன் பஸ்ஸின் 
கண்டக்டர் நான்.

என் உயிரே உயிரின்  பேட்டரியே
எனை நீ பிரியாதே
என் உயிரே உயிரின் பேட்டரியே
துளியும் குறையாதே.

எந்திர லோகத்து சுந்தரியே
எண்களில் காதலை சிந்தூரியே
எஞ்சினை அள்ளி  கொஞ்சுரியே
ஹே மின்சார சம்சாரமே

என் சென்சாருக்கு
உணர்வும் உணவும் நீ.
என் cable வழி
பரவும் தரவும்  நீ

என் விசைப்பொறி இயக்கம்
மயக்கம் நீ.
என் நியூரான் எல்லாம்
நிறையும் நிலவும் நீ.

என் குறும் பதிவே
என் கடவுச் சொல்லே
என் தனி மடிக்கணினி ரஜினி நீ ..
இளகும் இளகும்  இரும்பூவே
இன்றே உருகி ஒன்றாய் ஆவோமா

alpha என் alpha
நீதான் இனி
mega omega
நீதான் இனி.
லவ் யு  from
zero to infinity

seo.title: Endhira Logathu Sundariye Lyrics in Tamil From 2 Point 0 Film
seo.description: Full Endhira Logathu Sundhariye songs lyrics in tamil (என் உயிரே உயிரின்  பேட்டரியே எனை ...) 2.0 Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Karky, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Shashaa Tirpathi, Sid Sriram.
seo.keywords: Karky, 2.0, AR Rahman, Shashaa Tirpathi, Sid Sriram, Endhira Logathu Sundhariye full lyrics, 2.0 songs lyrics, Endhira Logathu Sundhariye lyrics snippets, Endhira Logathu Sundhariye WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Endhira Logathu Sundhariye lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and connection, portraying the beauty of romantic relationships.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie 2.0, a sequel to the blockbuster Enthiran.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Shashaa Tirpathi and Sid Sriram, both renowned for their melodious voices.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was this song released?

The song was released on October 29, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Endhira Logathu Sundariye, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the enchanting voices of Shashaa Tirpathi and Sid Sriram. The song serves as a backdrop to pivotal moments in the movie 2.0, highlighting the emotional connection between the characters. With AR Rahman's captivating music and Karky's heartfelt lyrics, the song evokes feelings of warmth and affection. It is a perfect blend of melody and emotion, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Endhira Logathu Sundariye from 2.0 is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and connection. With the enchanting voices of Shashaa Tirpathi and Sid Sriram, combined with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song takes listeners on a romantic journey. Experience the soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics that make this track a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: You are the battery of my life, don't leave me. You are the battery of my life, don't let it be incomplete.
Oh beautiful one from the world of technology, think of love among us, and bring me closer, oh bright conversation.
Don't place kisses on my eyes without love. Don't bring new flowers without affection.
The pure data you created won't let go. Hey, I am the conductor of your bus.
You are the battery of my life, don't leave me. You are the battery of my life, don't let it be incomplete.
Oh beautiful one from the world of technology, think of love among us, and bring me closer, oh bright conversation.
You are the feeling and the food for my sensor. You are the flow and the connection for my cable.
You are the movement of my visa. You are the fullness of my neurons and the brightness of my moon.
My entry is my prayer, you are my unique goddess, Rajini.
Oh flower of the world, shall we melt into one?
You are my alpha, you are my mega. I love you from zero to infinity.
You are the battery of my life, don't leave me. You are the battery of my life, don't let it be incomplete.
Oh beautiful one from the world of technology, think of love among us, and bring me closer, oh bright conversation.
The pure data you created won't let go. Hey, I am the conductor of your bus.
You are the battery of my life, don't leave me. You are the battery of my life, don't let it be incomplete.
